## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX team members and conduct an SEO deep dive for Diligent's challenges and needs.](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent faces significant SEO challenges, including adapting to AI shifts, visibility in AI search, and scaling best practices across teams](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [CTAs and experimentation processes are areas for potential quick wins in the GrowthX-Diligent partnership](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Website limitations (Sanity CMS) are hindering SEO efforts; schema implementation is a top priority](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Challenges

  - [Adapting to AI shifts in search: Weekly SEO roundups help stay informed, but communicating success metrics to leadership is difficult](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Lack of visibility in AI search conversation data](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Competitive analysis tools struggling to keep up with AI-first view](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [CTA functionality issues after Sanity migration](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Scaling SEO best practices (keyword cannibalization, duplicate content) across multiple teams](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Content inventory management and inter-team communication on existing/planned content](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [40+ significant content refreshes in H1 2023](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Using internal AI tool to surface related content](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Exploring AI for scaling content inventory management](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [John's team optimizing gated landing pages with AI-generated templates, boosting conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Technical SEO and Website Limitations

  - [Sanity CMS restricting ability to add alt text, images, and other elements](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Schema implementation pending, crucial for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Backend limitations in HTML editing and content flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)

### Experimentation and CTA Optimization

  - [CTA optimization at scale has been on "wish list" but deprioritized](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Using map of high-performing gated content for CTA placement](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve traffic to optimized landing pages through internal CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Cross-Team Collaboration

  - [SEO often not incorporated at project outsets, leading to retroactive fixes](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Need for better communication on SEO impact of technical/security decisions](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Web team inherited Sanity instance, working through limitations](https://fathom.video/share/aiQ5FvCZAPgDsZ9cz4y6Aa_z4147iiEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
